title: Helix Oxford Erasable Colouring Pencils - Pack of 12 Vibrant Colours With Strong Erasable Leads - Eraser Tipped Coloured Pencils
features: Bright and Colourful: Discover the joy of vibrant colours with our pack of 12 erasable pencils. Each pencil comes in a bright and lively shade, enabling you to bring your artwork to life with a rich spectrum of hues. From vivid reds to soothing blues, you'll have the perfect palette at your fingertips.

Smooth Coverage of Colour: Experience the smooth coverage and flawless application of colour. Our pencils are crafted to glide effortlessly across the page, leaving behind a vibrant and consistent layer of pigment. Whether you're shading, blending, or adding intricate details, these pencils deliver exceptional results every time.

Easy to Sharpen: Sharpening is a breeze with our easy-to-sharpen pencils. Keep your pencils sharp and ready for precise colouring and intricate work. Say goodbye to frustrating interruptions and enjoy uninterrupted creativity.

Erasable Colours: Don't worry about making mistakes! Our erasable pencils feature eraser-tipped ends, allowing you to correct and refine your artwork with ease. Whether you want to adjust a line, blend colours, or explore new techniques, simply erase and start anew. The possibilities are endless.
Reliable Oxford Brand: Part of the trusted and traditional Helix Oxford range, known for its premium quality and reliability
description: From the manufacturer Erasable Colouring Pencils Be creative, colour boldy and don't be afraid to colour outside the lines - you can erase any mistakes with the convenient eraser tip!
